2603.17529.title: AirDDE: Multifactor Neural Delay Differential Equations for Air Quality Forecasting
2603.17529.paper_summary: Accurate air quality forecasting is essential for public health and environmental sustainability, but remains challenging due to the complex pollutant dynamics. Existing deep learning methods often model pollutant dynamics as an instantaneous process, overlooking the intrinsic delays in pollutant propagation. Thus, we propose AirDDE, the first neural delay differential equation framework in this task that integrates delay modeling into a continuous-time pollutant evolution under physical guidance. Specifically, two novel components are introduced: (1) a memory-augmented attention module that retrieves globally and locally historical features, which can adaptively capture delay effects modulated by multifactor data; and (2) a physics-guided delay evolving function, grounded in the diffusion-advection equation, that models diffusion, delayed advection, and source/sink terms, which can capture delay-aware pollutant accumulation patterns with physical plausibility. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that AirDDE achieves the state-of-the-art forecasting performance with an average MAE reduction of 8.79\% over the best baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/w2obin/airdde-aaai.
2603.17529.paper_summary_zh: 準確的空氣質量預測對於公共健康和環境可持續性至關重要，但由於複雜的污染物動態，仍然面臨挑戰。現有的深度學習方法通常將污染物動態建模為瞬時過程，忽略了污染物傳播中的內在延遲。因此，我們提出了AirDDE，這是該任務中的第一個神經延遲微分方程框架，將延遲建模整合到物理指導下的連續時間污染物演變中。具體而言，引入了兩個新穎的組件：（1）一個增強記憶的注意力模組，能夠全局和局部檢索歷史特徵，能夠自適應捕捉由多因素數據調制的延遲效應；（2）一個基於擴散-對流方程的物理指導延遲演變函數，該函數建模擴散、延遲對流和源/匯項，能夠捕捉具有物理合理性的延遲感知污染物累積模式。在三個真實世界數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，AirDDE實現了最先進的預測性能，平均MAE減少了8.79\%，超過了最佳基準。代碼可在 https://github.com/w2obin/airdde-aaai 獲得。
2603.17529.author: Binqing Wu et.al.
2603.17529.authors: Binqing Wu, Zongjiang Shang, Shiyu Liu, Jianlong Huang, Jiahui Xu, Ling Chen
